title: Wooden Makeup Set Kids, Toddler Pretend Make-up & Hairdressing & Skincare Playset with Handbag, Fake Wooden Cosmetics Toy, Hairdresser Beautician Role Play, Birthday Gift for Girl Boy Age 2-6
features: COMPLETE KIT: The Smartwo wooden toy kit contains everything needed for skin care, make-up and hairstyling, such as hand bag, hair dryer, hair straightener, comb, hair clipper, scissors, mirror, hair ties (x2), headband, shampoo, conditioner, perfume, powder, eyeshadow, eyebrow pencil, brush, lipstick, nail polish, toner, serum, cream, sunscreen, 23 pieces in all. With lots of accessories and realistic shapes, this make-up kit offers young children lasting playtime fun.

MAKE-UP LEARNING GAME: Little girls love to imitate their mom when applying make-up. This wooden make-up kit satisfies young children's curiosity without creating a mess, and protects Mum's cosmetics.The storage bag provided makes the wooden make-up kit easy to store and carry. An ideal travel companion!

GIRL'S ROLE PLAY: This make-up kit offers a variety of play possibilities and enriches role-playing games. Whether they're facialists, hairdressers or beauticians, children can have fun exercising their fine motor skills, developing their language skills, imagination and social communication.

DESIGN EXPECTED BY CHILDREN: made from high-quality wood and painted with water-based paints, it's sturdy and durable. All accessories have rounded edges and pose no risk of injury to young children. Perfectly sized for baby's little hands.

FANTASTIC GIFT: Soft color, cute design and packaged in a beautiful cardboard box - this set of make-up toys is a perfect gift for girls, whether for a birthday, Easter, Christmas, Thanksgiving or the New Year. Recommended age: 2-6 years.
description: Product Description Smartwo Wooden Hair and Beauty Toys for Little Girls Welcome to our beauty parlour! And let our professional make-up artist do your hair, skin care and make-up. Toddlers Pretend Play Hairstyle, Face Care and Makeup Hair Care & Styling: Start with a hair wash using shampoo and conditioner. Next use comb and scissors for trimming, and hair straightener and hairdryer to create hairstylies! Hair ties for more looks. Skin Care Routine: Apply refreshing toner, lightweight lotion, and rich moisturizer to pamper the skin. Don’t forget the final shield—smooth on sunscreen to block harmful UV rays! Makeup & Fragrance: Blend colorful eyeshadow shades, shape perfect brows, and swipe on glossy lipstick. Add flair with vibrant nail polish. Spritz on perfume to complete your beauty creation! Ideal Role-Play Toys for Kids Natural wood, water paint Made of high quality wood and water-based paint, sturdy and durable. Quality tested and certified. Soft-colored toys Soft colors help reduce anxiety and promote concentration, emotional and aesthetic development. Size for little ones The size is suitable for small hands. All accessories are well made. Rounded edges. Safe for children to use. Extensive accessories A total of 23 items play set and supplied with a practical comestic bag forrole-play and creativity development. Safe and Non-toxic, Delicate and Durable Wooden Toy Set Long-lasting Fun for Toddlers and Adults Learn make-up with your little friends! Every child loves role play. Interactive play allows toddlers to improve their skills, imagination and social communication. Enjoy a happy time with your child! A good toy improves the relationship between parent and child. Play with your children and spend quality time with them!
